parameters.query: SELECT country, regulation_codes FROM config_regulatory_countries WHERE active = TRUE;

parameters.body: ={"model":"sonar","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"What regulatory changes have occurred in the past 14 days for traffic management, road safety, and temporary traffic control in Australia (especially NSW)? Include changes to TCAWS, AS/NZS 3845, and any state transport authority guidelines. Return only factual, sourced changes."}]}

={"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":2000,"system":"Extract regulatory changes relevant to TAS (Traffic & Access Solutions). Return JSON array: [{\"regulation_name\": \"...\", \"change_type\": \"new|amendment|repeal|guidance_update\", \"summary\": \"...\", \"impact_assessment\": \"...\", \"impact_severity\": \"low|medium|high|critical\", \"affected_products\": [...], \"state_province\": \"...\"}]. Return empty array [] if no relevant changes.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Research output: " + JSON.stringify($json)}]}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO regulatory_changes (regulation_name, change_type, summary, impact_assessment, impact_severity, affected_products, state_province, detected_by) VALUES ('{{$json.regulation_name}}', '{{$json.change_type}}', '{{$json.summary}}', '{{$json.impact_assessment}}', '{{$json.impact_severity}}', ARRAY[{{($json.affected_products || []).map(p => "'" + p + "'").join(',')}}]::text[], '{{$json.state_province}}', 'agent') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

meta.description: Wednesday 5 AM — scans for regulatory changes affecting traffic management in AU. Alerts on high-severity changes. Stores in regulatory_changes.
